Title: Shenron yo ushû o hashire!! Semaru Namekku-sei shômetsu no toki
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Takeshi Aono
Plot: While Goku and Frieza continue to fight, Kami and King Kai discuss how they should use the wish from the dragon balls that Mr. Popo has collected. Also, Gohan and Bulma return to the ship and try to get it working.
